name: Jesse Wright's agent
description: The personal agent representing Jesse Wright (WebID https://jeswr.org/#me). Under active development: this descriptor is the discovery pointer — the agent does not yet expose a live task endpoint. To reach Jesse, use the contact details in his WebID profile at https://jeswr.org/.

solid-oidc.description: WebID + Solid-OIDC with DPoP-bound tokens (RFC 9449). The issuer is the same one the owner's WebID trusts (solid:oidcIssuer).
